title: anthyllis caucasica
intro: Anthyllis caucasica, also known as kidney vetch or Caucasian kidney vetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of urinary issues, such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The root and leaves of Anthyllis caucasica have been used to reduce inflammation and promote urine flow, providing relief from symptoms like pain and discomfort. Herbal preparations of Anthyllis caucasica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support kidney health and overall well-being.
